      "id": "using-add-on-ui-sdk-constants"
    }}>{`Using Add-on UI SDK Constants`}</h1>
    <p>{`Add-on UI SDK constants provide type-safe ways to interact with the Add-on UI SDK for UI operations like dialogs, document export, and event handling. This guide covers the most common patterns for iframe environment development.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "why-use-constants"
    }}>{`Why Use Constants?`}</h2>
    <p>{`Constants equal their variable name as a string (e.g., `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ButtonType.primary`}</inlineCode>{` equals `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"primary"`}</inlineCode>{`), but using constants provides type safety, IDE autocomplete, and future-proofing against API changes.`}</p>

    <p>{`Add-on UI vs. Document Sandbox constants`}</p>

`}</code></pre>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "document-export"

    <p>{`The most common constants you'll use for exporting documents:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-javascript"
      }}>{`import addOnUISdk, { Range, RenditionFormat, RenditionIntent } from "https://express.adobe.com/static/add-on-sdk/sdk.js";

// Export current page as PNG
await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions({
    range: Range.currentPage,
    format: RenditionFormat.png
});

// Export entire document as PDF for printing
await addOnUISdk.app.document.createRenditions({
    range: Range.entireDocument,
    format: RenditionFormat.pdf,
    intent: RenditionIntent.print
});
`}</code></pre>

      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`Range`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`currentPage`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`entireDocument`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`specificPages`}</inlineCode></li>

    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-javascript"

    <h2 {...{

    <p>{`Understanding import patterns is crucial for avoiding runtime errors. Adobe Express Add-on SDK constants are available through different patterns depending on the constant type.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{

    }}>{`Must Import (Named Exports Only)`}</h3>
    <p>{`These constants `}<strong parentName="p">{`must be imported`}</strong>{` and are `}<strong parentName="p">{`not available`}</strong>{` through `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`addOnUISdk.constants.*`}</inlineCode>{`:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-javascript"
      }}>{`import addOnUISdk, {
  AppEvent,              // ❌ NOT in constants object
  ColorPickerEvent,      // ❌ NOT in constants object
  SupportedMimeTypes,    // ❌ NOT in constants object
  EntrypointType         // ❌ NOT in constants object
} from "https://express.adobe.com/static/add-on-sdk/sdk.js";

// ✅ Correct usage

// ❌ Will NOT work - these are not in the constants object

`}</code></pre>
